apigatewayv2.vpclink.CfnAbout: The `AWS::ApiGatewayV2::VpcLink` resource creates a VPC link. Supported only for HTTP APIs. The VPC link status must transition from `PENDING` to `AVAILABLE` to successfully create a VPC link, which can take up to 10 minutes. To learn more, see [Working with VPC Links for HTTP APIs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/http-api-vpc-links.html) in the *API Gateway Developer Guide*.

apigatewayv2.vpclink.Name.Description: The name of the VPC link.

apigatewayv2.vpclink.SecurityGroupIds.Description: A list of security group IDs for the VPC link.

apigatewayv2.vpclink.SubnetIds.Description: A list of subnet IDs to include in the VPC link.

apigatewayv2.vpclink.Tags.Description: The collection of tags. Each tag element is associated with a given resource.
